rulings.Case Title: SEAN FITZGERALD VS. MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc.'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Recorded On December 13, 2012, As Instrument No. 2010-J103771-00 In The County Of San Francisco And Request For Attorney'S Fees And Costs Against Plaintiff In The Amount Of $1,790.00
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012, line 6. Defendant Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc.'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Recorded On December 13, 2012, As Instrument No. 2010-J103771-00 In The County Of San Francisco And Request For Attorney'S Fees And Costs Against Plaintiff. Grant expunging Lis Pendens and sanctions totalling $1040. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GRACIELA CANIZALEZ VS. HECTOR NAVARRO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012, line DEFENDANTs HECTOR NAVARRO, ANTHONY NAVARRO and NAVARRO FAMILY TRUST's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, Overrule as to eighth cause of action, no such cause of action. Sustain as to second cause of action with leave to amend to allege severe emotional distress. Sustain without leave to amend as to sixth cause of action constructive eviction was actual physical eviction. Sustain with leave to amend as to seventh cause of action to allege basis for attorney fees and restitution. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GRACIELA CANIZALEZ VS. HECTOR NAVARRO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANTs HECTOR NAVARRO, ANTHONY NAVARRO and NAVARRO FAMILY TRUST's MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Deny Motion to Strike re punitives, sufficiently sets forth allegation to support. Grant, without leave to amend as to "other tenants" and "other properties..." Grant with leave to amend to allege "family community." Grant without leave to amend as to wrongful eviction in caption as cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A., AS TRUSTEE VS. CHARLES SCHOBER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT NATHAN VOLD's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. San Francisco Rent Ordinance is affirmative defense. Unlawful Detainer sufficient per 1161a. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KALPESH GOHIL VS. HERBERT HOLLAND et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT HERBERT HOLLAND's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer, failed to sustain burden. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOTEL MIRABELLE LLC VS. BRIAN BROWN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT BRIAN BROWN's Motion To Strike. Grant with five days leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHEILA YEE VS. MEI BIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Recall And Quash The Writ Of Execution; Memo Of P & A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT ORLANDO CHAVEZ's Motion To Recall And Quash The Writ Of Execution. Grant, no opposition filed. Prejudment Claim of Right to Possession properly filed and Judgment should not have issued. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHEILA YEE VS. MEI BIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT MELVIN FERRERA's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Grant, no opposition filed. Never received three day notice and summons. = (501/REQ)
